Thank you for contributing to తెలుగు పంచాంగం!

Before submitting, please make sure:
- One PR, one concern (don't mix features and fixes)
- Tests + typecheck + lint all pass locally
- For engine changes: include unit tests and Venkatrama validation
- For UI changes: tested at 375px, 768px and 1280px
-->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📅 Festival / Panchangam accuracy correction
- [ ] 🌐 Translation improvement
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Refactor / build / tooling
- [ ] 🎨 UI / styling

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` — all 109+ tests pass
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` — zero TypeScript errors
- [ ] `npm run lint` — zero lint errors
- [ ] For engine changes: added or updated tests in `src/engine/*.test.ts` or `validation/regression.test.ts`
- [ ] For UI changes: tested on mobile (375 px), tablet (768 px) and desktop (1280 px)
- [ ] For festival/Tithi corrections: cross-checked against Venkatrama or another printed Panchangam
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env*` files committed
